assessment.approach: The challenge requires interacting with the Aurora API. Based on the evidence, the workflow involves first calling POST /api/aurora/open to obtain a runId and signal data, then using these values in a PUT /api/aurora/close request to complete the challenge. I will extract the runId and the signal from the 23rd channel (index 22) as indicated by the relations evidence.
uncertainties: The exact index of the signal required for the close operation is specified as channel 23 (index 22) in the relations evidence, which I will follow.
